current_idea:
After carefully reviewing the HARD EXECUTION CONSTRAINTS and the founder's profile, I've generated an idea that meets all the requirements.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💡 IDEA: MENA Handmade Marketplace
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Problem it solves : Connecting consumers in the MENA region with unique, handmade products from local artisans and small businesses, addressing the lack of discovery and accessibility of these products.
Target customer   : Consumers in the MENA region, particularly women aged 25-45, interested in unique, handmade, and locally sourced products.
How it works      : The founder will curate a selection of handmade products from local artisans and small businesses, creating a marketplace where consumers can discover and purchase these products. The founder will manage the marketplace, handle customer support, and facilitate transactions between buyers and sellers.
Launch stack      : Sharetribe for marketplace platform, WhatsApp Business for customer support, and PayPal for payment processing.
Business model    : The marketplace will charge a commission fee (10-15%) on each sale made through the platform.
Why you can do it : The founder's skills in market research, business strategy, and project management will enable them to successfully curate and manage the marketplace, while their communication and negotiation skills will help them build strong relationships with artisans and small businesses.
First 7-day test  : Create a WhatsApp group or Facebook page to validate interest in handmade products and gather feedback from potential customers.
Startup cost      : $200 (Sharetribe subscription, WhatsApp Business, and initial marketing expenses).
Risk level        : Medium — the success of the marketplace depends on the quality of products, effective marketing, and the ability to attract and retain both buyers and sellers.

This idea meets all the requirements: it's a B2C marketplace, can be launched from a laptop under $500 using no-code tools, and doesn't require any coding skills or a large team.

chat_history.content:
Generate the ONE best startup idea for this founder. Before writing, confirm to yourself:
1. Did I read the HARD EXECUTION CONSTRAINTS section? The founder has NO coding skills and is SOLO — no software building, no team.
2. Is this a B2C MARKETPLACE idea where consumers are the end users? The founder's business interest is Marketplace, which means buyers and sellers, not B2B tools or logistics services.
3. Can this be launched from a laptop under $500 using no-code tools?

If all 3 are yes — write the idea in the exact structured format. If not — think again until you have one that passes all 3 checks.
